rationale: The citing paper is a conceptual review about Lucas-critique vulnerability, parameter stability, and diagnostics across marketing models, while the cited paper studies nonstationarity and time-varying elasticities after innovation using a dynamic model—so it could plausibly be used as methodological/empirical support rather than a purely incidental mention. However, the matched evidence is only a single DOI reference with no in-text citation context, so the strength of the linkage is unclear from current evidence.
